subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto all who dwell in the heavens and on the earth, wherein the Youth calleth unto the servants of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من فی السموات و الارض و ینادی فیه الغلام عباد الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @proclamation to the people of the world
